title: BitcoinWiki Bounty Results!
excerpt: I’m happy to announce the winners of our Community Bounty Contest to create an updated Particl informational page at BitcoinWiki.org
custom_excerpt: I’m happy to announce the winners of our Community Bounty Contest to create an updated Particl informational page at BitcoinWiki.org

primary_tag.name: News & Updates
primary_tag.description: The latest buzz from Particl. Tomorrow's blockchain e-commerce privacy solution for the better of all.

tags.name: News & Updates
tags.description: The latest buzz from Particl. Tomorrow's blockchain e-commerce privacy solution for the better of all.

plaintext:
I’m happy to announce the winners of our Community Bounty Contest to create an
updated Particl informational page at BitcoinWiki.org
[https://en.bitcoinwiki.org/wiki/Main_Page]

BitcoinWiki.org is:

> an independent project existing thanks to the active members of the
cryptocurrency community.
Bitcoin Wiki [https://en.bitcoinwiki.org/wiki/Main_Page]
The first blockchain was conceptualised in 2008 by an anonymous person or group
known as Satoshi Nakamoto and… [https://en.bitcoinwiki.org/wiki/Main_Page]
en.bitcoinwiki.org [https://en.bitcoinwiki.org/wiki/Main_Page]

It boasts 3,604 articles in English at the time of this announcement.
Impressive!

A Request For Help
Our Telegram channel [https://t.me/particlproject] got a request from “Max” at
Bitcoin Wiki

It seemed like a great opportunity for volunteers to lend a hand so we quickly
came up with a rough outline and threw in some PART as an incentive to
contribute!

Bounty Winners
 * *CryptoGuard— 50 PART
 * Part-linux— 25 PART
 * Serendipity— 10 PART
 * Kapoorsudartha— 10 PART
 * BB2k18–10 PART
 * Fragile— 7.5 PART

I have to say, I was impressed with the teamwork you guys showed breaking down
all the details of the Project into a Wiki format!

This page will be a beacon of information regarding Particl and it was all
community developed and delivered.
Bravo!

> *FYI: This work was done before CryptoGuard joined
[https://particl.news/longtime-contributor-cryptoguard-joins-particl-as-lead-community-officer-f33d87ef18df] 
the team.
Breakdown of contributions
It was truly a team effort

 * Description/concept: Kapoorsudartha, Part-linux, CryptoGuard
 * Token exchange: CryptoGuard
 * CT / RingCT: CryptoGuard, Part-linux
 * Smart-contract BIP: Part-linux
 * Graphics MAD Escrow: CryptoGuard, Part-linux, BB2k18
 * Foundation: Kapoorsudartha, Serendipity, CryptoGuard
 * Links: Part-linux, Fragile
 * Market token distro: CryptoGuard
 * API: Fragile

I will be reaching out to each of you to get your PART receiving address and
send your bounty rewards.

My personal favorite exercise I saw
One of the hottest debates we always have when explaining Particl is “What is
Particl?”

 * Particl is a privacy currency
 * Particl is a privacy marketplace
 * Particl is a privacy platform.

CryptoGuard took the time to play each scenario out with our products, features
and future developments in these outlines:

Outline 1 is Particl as a Privacy PlatformThis exercise lead to a very easy to
follow Bitcoin Wiki page outline for Particl as a Privacy Platform. I think
anyone who is looking for more information about our project will surely find it
easy and logical to read.

Go, have a look for yourself
Particl - Bitcoin Wiki [https://en.bitcoinwiki.org/wiki/Particl]
Particl - An open source and decentralized platform
[https://en.bitcoinwiki.org/wiki/Particl]en.bitcoinwiki.org
[https://en.bitcoinwiki.org/wiki/Particl]

More opportunities to earn PART in bounties, contests, etc coming soon™️

Join us in our Riot/Telegram channels to learn about ways you can get involved:

 * Riot Channels: https://particl.wiki/socialmedia-channels#riot
 * Telegram Channels: https://particl.wiki/socialmedia-channels#telegram

Thank you again for your contributions guys!
Particl Team
html:
I’m happy to announce the winners of our Community Bounty Contest to create an updated Particl informational page at BitcoinWiki.org

BitcoinWiki.org is:

an independent project existing thanks to the active members of the cryptocurrency community.

Bitcoin Wiki
The first blockchain was conceptualised in 2008 by an anonymous person or group known as Satoshi Nakamoto and…en.bitcoinwiki.org

It boasts 3,604 articles in English at the time of this announcement. Impressive!

A Request For Help

Our Telegram channel got a request from “Max” at Bitcoin Wiki

It seemed like a great opportunity for volunteers to lend a hand so we quickly came up with a rough outline and threw in some PART as an incentive to contribute!

Bounty Winners

  • *CryptoGuard — 50 PART
  • Part-linux — 25 PART
  • Serendipity — 10 PART
  • Kapoorsudartha — 10 PART
  • BB2k18–10 PART
  • Fragile — 7.5 PART

I have to say, I was impressed with the teamwork you guys showed breaking down all the details of the Project into a Wiki format!

This page will be a beacon of information regarding Particl and it was all community developed and delivered.

Bravo!

*FYI: This work was done before CryptoGuard joined the team.

Breakdown of contributions

It was truly a team effort

  • Description/concept: Kapoorsudartha, Part-linux, CryptoGuard
  • Token exchange: CryptoGuard
  • CT / RingCT: CryptoGuard, Part-linux
  • Smart-contract BIP: Part-linux
  • Graphics MAD Escrow: CryptoGuard, Part-linux, BB2k18
  • Foundation: Kapoorsudartha, Serendipity, CryptoGuard
  • Links: Part-linux, Fragile
  • Market token distro: CryptoGuard
  • API: Fragile

I will be reaching out to each of you to get your PART receiving address and send your bounty rewards.

My personal favorite exercise I saw

One of the hottest debates we always have when explaining Particl is “What is Particl?”

  • Particl is a privacy currency
  • Particl is a privacy marketplace
  • Particl is a privacy platform.

CryptoGuard took the time to play each scenario out with our products, features and future developments in these outlines:

This exercise lead to a very easy to follow Bitcoin Wiki page outline for Particl as a Privacy Platform. I think anyone who is looking for more information about our project will surely find it easy and logical to read.

Go, have a look for yourself

Particl - Bitcoin Wiki
Particl - An open source and decentralized platformen.bitcoinwiki.org

More opportunities to earn PART in bounties, contests, etc coming soon™️

Join us in our Riot/Telegram channels to learn about ways you can get involved:

  • Riot Channels: https://particl.wiki/socialmedia-channels#riot
  • Telegram Channels: https://particl.wiki/socialmedia-channels#telegram

Thank you again for your contributions guys!

Particl Team
